scores.correctness_notes: Core answer is correct: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active and all_agents_idle, combined lambda pattern all match gold standard. Additional examples are reasonable extensions.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout as an instance attribute set directly is not confirmed in gold standard. The 'error=' parameter mentioned in gold standard (jubilant.any_error) is not shown. Minor: deploy path format note in gold standard says must start with '/' or '.' but agent uses './my-charm_amd64.charm' which is fine. The wait() signature shows 'delay=1.0' parameter which may or may not exist — gold standard only mentions timeout and successes.
